### Follow-Up Delivery
- provider gateways read pending invitations with `gitclaw channel-outbox --channel <provider> --account-id <account> --issue-number <issue> --out <file>`
- provider gateways record sent invitations with `gitclaw channel-delivery --channel <provider> --account-id <account> --issue-number <issue> --comment-id <comment> --external-message-id <message>`
- duplicate invitations are suppressed independently for each route by `channel + message_id`
